x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case resolution notes are the primary training signal for Now Assist HRSD case summarization. Missing resolution notes mean Now Assist has no structured resolution context to learn from or summarize.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make close notes mandatory at HR case closure via UI policy. Train HR service desk agents to document resolution steps in close_notes before closing cases. Target: 80%+ of closed HR cases with close notes in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c69
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[HR case resolution notes are the primary training signal for Now Assist HRSD case summarization. Missing resolution notes mean Now Assist has no structured resolution context to learn from or summarize.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HR Case Resolution Notes</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    // close_notes is the OOB resolution field on sn_hr_core_case
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. Close notes coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('close_notes', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var populated = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes (last 12 months, ' + populated + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes. Now Assist HRSD summarization has strong resolution context for AI-generated case summaries.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes (target: 80%). Now Assist HRSD summarization quality will be reduced for cases missing resolution context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases missing close notes (' + pct + '% populated). Critical gap — Now Assist HRSD cannot generate meaningful case summaries without resolution context.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HRSD</module>
<number>CHK0006020</number>
<order>30</order>
<remediation_guidance>Make close notes mandatory at HR case closure via UI policy. Train HR service desk agents to document resolution steps in close_notes before closing cases. Target: 80%+ of closed HR cases with close notes in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c69</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
